description: Local auth replaces Clerk. POST /api/v1/auth/register with { email, password, tenantName } returns 201 with { user, tenant, token } (a signed JWT, no external IdP). POST /api/v1/auth/login with the same credentials returns a fresh JWT; a wrong password returns 401. GET /api/v1/whoami with Authorization: Bearer <token> returns the user and tenant. The JWT is signed with JWT_SECRET from env, verified locally with jose, and the Clerk webhook endpoint, clerk-client, and ClerkUserEmailResolver are removed from the running code path. Tenant isolation (AC-010) still holds for tokens issued by this endpoint.
